name: Advance America
description_short: At 1985 E Stop 13 Rd, Indianapolis, IN, Advance America provides same-day cash advances and title loans during extended business hours.
description_long:
Advance America's Indianapolis location at 1985 E Stop 13 Rd sits on the city's east side as a standalone storefront for quick access to emergency cash services. Open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday morning hours until 2 PM, this Indianapolis shop serves residents who need weekend or after-work lending options. The store is positioned for fast transactions—step in, apply, and typically receive funds the same day.

At this 1985 E Stop 13 Rd location in Indianapolis, IN, you can access short-term cash advances, title loans against your car, check cashing, and other quick-access lending products. To discuss rates, eligibility, or your specific situation, call 317-881-6328 during business hours. The application process is streamlined and typically completes in 15–30 minutes if you bring the required documents.

For Indianapolis residents facing an unexpected bill or temporary cash shortage, this East Stop storefront offers a faster alternative to traditional bank loan processes, which can take weeks. Bring a valid photo ID, recent pay stub or proof of income, and (for title loans) your vehicle title and proof of insurance. The Advance America team at this Indianapolis location specializes in rapid decisions so you can address urgent needs.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee. Loan terms are governed by state law; contact provider for cancellation or rescission options available in your state.

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: APRs vary by state (example: 348% APR in SC on $650/6-month loan)
Funds in as few as 24 hours online

tiers.name: Title Loans (LoanCenter)
features: Keep driving your vehicle during loan term

pros: Largest state-licensed consumer lender in the US by store count — 1,200–1,900 locations across ~28 states
Founded in 1997 with nearly 30 years of short-term lending experience
Same-day in-store funding and next-day online funding available in many states
CFSA founding member — adheres to industry-established best-practice lending standards
BBB A+ rating with accreditation since 2024
State-by-state fee and APR disclosures published transparently on their website
Dual in-store and fully online application options across 27+ states
cons: Payday loan APRs of 350%–700% make these among the highest-cost borrowing options legally available
BBB customer review score is 1.7/5 based on 154 reviews — sharply below the A+ institutional rating
302 BBB complaints filed in the last 3 years, indicating recurring consumer service and collections issues
No confirmed standalone mobile app — digital access is limited to a web-based online portal
Product availability and loan limits vary significantly by state; not all products offered everywhere
best_for: Credit-challenged consumers with bad or no credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours
Underbanked individuals without access to credit cards or traditional bank personal loans
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and need same-day cash at a physical storefront
Short-term bridge borrowers who are confident they can repay the full balance within 30 days
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for credit-challenged or underbanked consumers facing a genuine short-term cash emergency who have already exhausted lower-cost options like credit union PALs, employer advances, or family loans. The main caveat is cost: APRs of 350%–700% on payday products make these loans one of the most expensive forms of legal consumer credit, and the 1.7/5 BBB consumer review score alongside 302 complaints in three years are meaningful red flags worth reviewing before borrowing.
services: Lines of Credit (up to $4,000, select states)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 1985 E Stop 13 Rd, Indianapolis, IN. Same-day cash advances and title loans with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
